scripts.dev: docker compose up -d --wait postgres minio temporal temporal-ui && docker compose run --rm minio-init && docker compose run --rm temporal-init && pnpm db:push && concurrently -n ui,agent -c cyan,magenta "pnpm --filter ui dev" "pnpm --filter agent dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @clawly-work/db build && concurrently "pnpm --filter ui build" "pnpm --filter agent build"
scripts.start: docker compose --profile app build ui agent db-push && docker compose up -d --wait postgres minio temporal temporal-ui && docker compose run --rm minio-init && docker compose run --rm temporal-init && docker compose --profile app run --rm db-push && docker compose --profile app up -d --wait ui agent
